title: Korak 11

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should print Valid format. after your if statement.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`
_if_statement = "if is_invalid:\\n  return False"
_Node(_code).find_function("validate").is_ordered(_if_statement, "print('Valid format.')")
`)) })

description: Nakon izjave if, odštampajte niz znakova Valid format.. Zatim vratite True.
